items.title: Lag biological conflation (5m operational vs 18-24yr Chusquea cycle)
items.evidence: L71 manuscript: conflates 5m operational lag FSI->case with Chusquea masting 18-24 year cycle
items.mechanism: Mis-framing could make a reviewer reject the EWS claim as ecologically implausible
items.fix_hint: Separate explicitly in Discussion: FSI is a proxy for short-term greenness, not the masting cycle
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence found documenting L71 conflation of 5m operational lag with 18-24yr Chusquea cycle. Genuinely new critical finding.

items.title: RPS presented as +1.3% skill when CI overlaps null
items.evidence: L123: 'RPS skill +1.3%' but bootstrap CI includes null
items.mechanism: Inflated skill claim could trigger reviewer rejection of scoring rule section
items.fix_hint: Reframe as '2 of 3 scoring rules positive; RPS skill not distinguishable from null'
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence found documenting RPS +1.3% skill claim with CI overlapping null at L123. New statistical interpretation issue.

items.title: BSS CI is percentile, not BCa
items.evidence: T_BLINDAJE_BSS_CI_S57.csv uses boot percentile instead of BCa
items.mechanism: Inconsistency with PR-AUC (which uses BCa) -> reviewer flag
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence found documenting percentile vs BCa CI method discrepancy in T_BLINDAJE_BSS_CI_S57.csv. New methodological finding.

items.title: Ortiz 2004 cited as source for 3-5x national incidence ratio
items.evidence: L45 cites Ortiz 2004 but Ortiz reports rodent seroprevalence VIII Region, not national HCPS incidence
items.mechanism: Factual misattribution -> reviewer flags as data fabrication
items.fix_hint: Replace with MINSAL Bulletin + direct calculation
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence found documenting Ortiz 2004 citation mismatch (rodent serology vs national HCPS incidence at L45). New citation error.

items.title: DAG: FSI_R5 (exposure) lacks direct arrow to SCPH_cases
items.evidence: R1_DAG_dagitty.txt has FSI_R5 without -> SCPH_cases edge; adjustment set becomes formally incorrect
items.mechanism: Legacy S37 issue; reviewer with DAG expertise will catch it
items.fix_hint: Add arrow + supplementary note explaining semantics
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence found documenting missing FSI_R5->SCPH_cases edge in R1_DAG_dagitty.txt. New causal modeling issue.

items.title: Case definition drift MINSAL 2002-2024 (IgM pre-2012 vs RT-PCR post-2012)
items.evidence: Case definition changed when RT-PCR became standard
items.mechanism: Differential sensitivity over time -> spurious temporal trend
items.fix_hint: Sensitivity analysis restricting to 2012+, report delta
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence found documenting MINSAL case definition drift (IgM pre-2012 vs RT-PCR post-2012). New surveillance quality finding.

items.title: Winner's curse lag 5 + biological confusion 18-24m vs 5m
items.evidence: Lag 5 chosen from scan of multiple lags
items.mechanism: Post-hoc lag selection inflates effect size
items.fix_hint: Document pre-specification lineage; report all lags' IRR for transparency
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence found documenting winner's curse on lag 5 selection from multiple scans. New statistical bias finding.

items.title: FSI compound formula (NDMI+NDVI+NBR2) weights undocumented
items.evidence: FSI computation script does not cite a formal paper for the weighting
items.mechanism: Custom index without precedent -> reviewer suspicion of tuning
items.fix_hint: Cite Bortman 1999 or provide sensitivity analysis with alternative weights
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence found documenting undocumented FSI compound formula (NDMI+NDVI+NBR2) weights. New methodology documentation gap.

items.title: SEREMI temporal reporting intensity not controlled
items.evidence: Reporting effort likely increased after 2018 Nuble creation
items.fix_hint: Include year FE and compare slopes
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence found documenting SEREMI temporal reporting intensity bias post-2018 Nuble creation. New surveillance bias finding.

items.title: SEREMI Maule pre-2018 (Nuble split from Maule)
items.evidence: Before 2018 all Nuble cases reported under Maule
items.fix_hint: Describe back-allocation procedure explicitly in methods
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence found documenting Nuble split from Maule in 2018 affecting case attribution. New administrative boundary confound.

items.title: False equivalence dengue EWS (Lowe, Colon-Gonzalez)
items.evidence: Comparing HCPS EWS to dengue EWS ignores base rate differences
items.mechanism: Reviewer will flag as inappropriate analogy
items.fix_hint: Acknowledge base rate asymmetry; cite Tier 3 limitations
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence found addressing base rate differences between HCPS and dengue EWS contexts. Genuinely new methodological critique.

items.title: 'First satellite-triggered multi-agency protocol' claim without systematic search
items.evidence: Discussion claims 'first' without Scopus/WoS search documentation
items.fix_hint: Replace 'first' with 'to our knowledge among the first'; document search terms
items.mcc_rationale: No documentation of systematic search (Scopus/WoS) for 'first satellite-triggered multi-agency protocol' claim found in memory or vault.

items.title: E-values without named biological confounders
items.evidence: E-values 2.07 and 2.30 reported without named confounders
items.fix_hint: Name agricultural activity, surveillance intensity, rural tourism
items.mcc_rationale: E-values 2.07 and 2.30 reported but no prior evidence documents naming specific biological confounders required for interpretation.

items.title: ACF residuals within-commune not tested
items.evidence: DHARMa uses global index, not within-commune ACF
items.mechanism: Independence assumption central to GLMM nbinom2 unverified
items.fix_hint: Add commune-stratified ACF plot as Figure S4
items.mcc_rationale: ACF residuals within-commune testing gap not previously documented. DHARMa global index limitation is new finding.

items.title: Poisson vs NB2 LRT boundary issue without Vuong correction
items.evidence: Methods L210 LRT reported without mixture correction
items.mechanism: Boundary LRT is invalid on theta=0 edge
items.fix_hint: Use pscl::vuong() or the score test
items.mcc_rationale: Poisson vs NB2 LRT boundary issue without Vuong/mixture correction not found in prior evidence. Methods L210 critique is new.

items.title: theta not propagated in bootstrap BSS
items.evidence: Bootstrap holds theta fixed -> CI underestimates uncertainty
items.fix_hint: Parametric bootstrap refitting inside each iteration
items.mcc_rationale: Bootstrap BSS holding theta fixed not previously documented. CI underestimation due to non-propagated dispersion parameter is new.

items.title: Immortal time rolling windows
items.evidence: Rolling 3m FSI windows overlap with case observation
items.mcc_rationale: Immortal time bias in rolling 3-month FSI windows not found in prior memory or vault. Overlap with case observation is new critique.

items.title: Omission of null lags
items.evidence: Only significant lags reported
items.mcc_rationale: Omission of null lags (reporting only significant lags) not documented in prior evidence. Publication bias concern is new.

items.title: Bortman calibration fold-by-fold not tested
items.evidence: Fold-wise calibration not in supplementary
items.mcc_rationale: Bortman calibration fold-by-fold testing absence not found in prior supplementary documentation. Genuinely new gap.

items.title: Ward binary Simpson
items.evidence: Ward clustering uses binary distance
items.mcc_rationale: Ward clustering using binary distance (Simpson index) instead of continuous metrics not previously documented. New methodological concern.

items.title: Cluster 2023 outlier influence
items.evidence: El Carmen cluster 2023 is a leverage point
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence found in memory or vault regarding El Carmen cluster 2023 leverage point analysis.

items.title: ERA5 topographia compleja
items.evidence: Coarse ERA5 grid in Andean foothills
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence discussing ERA5 grid resolution limitations in Andean foothills context.

items.title: DCA circular (same OOS dataset)
items.evidence: Decision curve analysis uses same test set
items.fix_hint: Report DCA with train-test split disclosure
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence addressing decision curve analysis circularity issue with same test set.

items.title: Table 1 70.9% vs Table 2 68.1% inconsistency
items.evidence: Two tables report BSS with different denominators
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence documenting Table 1 vs Table 2 BSS denominator inconsistency (70.9% vs 68.1%).

items.title: Argumentum ad verecundiam Fox 2024
items.evidence: Uses Fox 2024 as authority without discussing influenza vs HCPS differences
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence discussing Fox 2024 citation or influenza vs HCPS methodological differences.

items.title: M-bias Chusquea->FSI partially blocked by ENSO r~0
items.evidence: M-bias structure not explicitly discussed
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence on M-bias structure in Chusquea->FSI pathway or ENSO correlation blocking.

items.title: Effect modification FSIxT2m / FSIxseason not tested
items.evidence: No interaction terms in model
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence discussing FSIxT2m or FSIxseason interaction terms or effect modification testing.

items.title: Hausman test nomenclature in GLMM nbinom2
items.evidence: 'Hausman test' terminology used incorrectly
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence addressing Hausman test nomenclature issue in GLMM nbinom2 context.

items.title: AR(1) cases not included as predictor
items.evidence: No autoregressive term in model
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence discussing AR(1) autoregressive term omission from predictive model.

items.title: XGBoost/RF comparison absent
items.evidence: No ML benchmark
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence on XGBoost/RF machine learning benchmark comparison absence.

items.title: CONAF coverage variability
items.evidence: CONAF fire coverage changes over years
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence found regarding CONAF fire coverage temporal variability. Genuinely new observation.

items.title: Tier 3 P(T3|T2) not reported
items.evidence: Conditional probability missing
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence documenting missing conditional probability P(T3|T2) for Tier 3. New gap identified.

items.title: Table 1 missing N denominator
items.evidence: Table 1 percentages without N in footnote
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence of Table 1 denominator reporting issue. New formatting gap detected.

items.title: LOCO-CV AUC only in rebuttal
items.evidence: LOCO-CV not in main text
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence discussing LOCO-CV AUC placement in rebuttal vs main text. New structural observation.

items.title: Formal mediation analysis absent
items.evidence: No VanderWeele mediation
items.mcc_rationale: No prior evidence regarding absence of formal VanderWeele mediation analysis. New methodological gap identified.
